name: Vantea SMART S.p.A.
summary: Vantea SMART S.p.A., an Information Technology company, engages in the provision of cybersecurity solutions and services. It develops software products and digital e-commerce platforms. The company's cybersecurity related solutions cover services for countermeasures and on assets, monitoring and automatic response services, and governance services; and security operations, on-site specialist support, security consulting, and support services on security solutions. It also provides solutions in the ERP sector; distribution sector comprising food and beverage; and concierge sector. The company was founded in 1993 and is based in Rome, Italy.
